title: BaziInput
description: Phase 1 input schema for the deterministic bazi skeleton.

birth_date.description: Birth date in YYYY-MM-DD format. When calendar_type=lunar, this is the lunar date without a leap-month marker.

timezone.description: Supported in wide_input_v0 only for the explicit whitelist maintained in configs/input_normalization.yaml.

true_solar_time.description: When true, calc uses the configured birth_place longitude whitelist before entering the existing solar calculation chain.
